name: 9 RPG
description:
The story begins with a hand-stitched doll, labeled with the number 9, awakening in a desolate and ruined world. He soon discovers a small community of eight other similar beings, each a fragment of a human scientist's soul, taking refuge from fearsome, monstrous machines that still roam the earth.

Against the wishes of their fearful and dogmatic leader, 1, the curious 9 convinces some of the others to take the offensive to survive and understand their purpose. His actions inadvertently reawaken the primary antagonist, a machine called the Fabrication Machine (or B.R.A.I.N.), which begins hunting the Stitchpunks to absorb their souls with a mysterious talisman.

Through a series of intense battles and self-sacrifices, the surviving dolls learn the truth about their origins and the cause of humanity's downfall via a holographic message left by their creator. In the end, the remaining Stitchpunks unite to destroy the Fabrication Machine, release the trapped souls of their fallen comrades, and bring new, organic life back to the world, completing the cycle of life.
creator: Tavinator
